infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RoofIntel Chase uses your location to find nearby commercial roofing leads and send proximity alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: RoofIntel Chase uses background location to alert you when high-value leads are nearby while you're in the field.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: RoofIntel Chase uses background location to alert you when high-value leads are nearby.
